Fine Steel Dagger  
 

Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 3 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 3
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.4 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Send a correction
Post Comment
Easier Way
QuoteReply
# Jan 01 2015 at 10:20 PM Rating: Decent
Venenzi
Scholar
66 posts
It's easier to get shivs in the gulf of gunthak. n1736 p54 south east part of zone square shaped area with many out buildings. They are social agro and my 103 rogue could just run around and pull the dozens of them at once and they killed themselves with riposte. Got 6 shivs first pass in 10 minutes.
▲ Page top
Rog Epic 1.5
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2014 at 1:25 PM Rating: Good
gutsuya
Sage
299 posts
You will need 11 of these for the ROG 1.5.

I camped Mistemoore with a large DS and trained the crap out of that zone. Still took several days to get all the daggers. So, I am hoping there is a better way.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2004 at 11:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251839011
Scholar
93 posts
Merchant Tekrama (Trader Satchel vendor) in the Bazaar sold me 11 at 42p each
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 27 2002 at 11:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im really glad they decided to update this weapon. Its the most uberest of all weapons in the game. Thats why it drops so much and from so many different mobs. In case you did not know im being sarcastic.
Thes are alright
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 8:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361922318
57 posts
Okay, they dont cause much damage, but BOY ARE THEY FAST!!!
I killed a black wolf in 20 secs at level 2 with one of these
▲ Page top
HEHEHEHEH!!!!
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361922318
57 posts
I got one of these at level 2, found a dead guard, (DE) and Looted it...
Why are you looking at me like that for!
I'm a rogue goddamn it!

Vindilan
Rogue of the Ebon Mask
▲ Page top
So many creatures
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2002 at 3:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757232433
79 posts
Cool, now we have some dozen of links to creatures who drop this item, although it is still only found in Soluseks Eye =).

Nevertheless, this item is very usefull for anyone with pets, like me, an enchanter. I always give my pet two of these so it can dual wield. The damamge my pet does does not chnge when I give him any harder DMG weapon, it only hits faster with low delay weapons like this.

Oh yeah, it sells for almost 5pp to vendors, and you can buy dly 20 Daggers from vendors for 2pp, but hey. My pets only get good stuff =) Only bummer is that I dont get my weapons back. There needs to be some "Reclaim Items" spell =)
▲ Page top
